Off Calendar May-05-2022 Continued To Jul-20-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. BRAD SMITH, Esq. of Center for Disability Access (Tel: 858-375-7385) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GOLCHEHREH & DOKHANCHIFAR CHIROPRACTIC CORP.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's "demurrer to complaint" is overruled. The complaint pleads the elements of its two causes of action. (Id. at 6:25-8:4; CACI 3061.) That suffices under our California courts' liberal pleading rules. The published cases defendant relies on are from the federal courts which do not follow California demurrer rules. Defendant raises factual disputes as to whether its website provides "effective communication" (Memo. 1:17); this is inappropriate in a demurrer. Purported lack of standing is not raised in defendant's notice of demurrers.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
